MSH.description: Message Header - Contains routing and control information

MSH.1.name: Field Separator
MSH.1.description: Character used to separate fields within segments

MSH.2.name: Encoding Characters
MSH.2.description: Characters used for encoding - component separator, repetition separator, escape character, subcomponent separator

MSH.7.name: Date/Time of Message
MSH.7.description: Date and time when the message was created

MSH.9.name: Message Type
MSH.9.description: Identifies the message type, trigger event, and message structure

MSH.11.name: Processing ID
MSH.11.description: Identifies whether the message is production, training, or debugging

PID.description: Patient Identification - Contains patient demographic information

PID.1.name: Set ID - PID
PID.1.description: Sequence number for multiple PID segments

PID.7.name: Date/Time of Birth
PID.7.description: Patient's date and time of birth

PID.19.name: SSN Number - Patient
PID.19.description: Patient's social security number (deprecated in v2.5)

PID.20.name: Driver's License Number - Patient
PID.20.description: Patient's driver's license number (deprecated in v2.5)

PV1.1.name: Set ID - PV1
PV1.1.description: Sequence number for multiple PV1 segments

PV1.2.name: Patient Class
PV1.2.description: Classification of patient visit (E=Emergency, I=Inpatient, O=Outpatient, etc.)

PV1.12.name: Preadmit Test Indicator
PV1.12.description: Indicates if preadmission testing is required

PV1.13.name: Re-admission Indicator
PV1.13.description: Indicates if this is a readmission

OBR.description: Observation Request - Contains information about diagnostic tests or observations ordered

OBR.1.name: Set ID - OBR
OBR.1.description: Sequence number for multiple OBR segments

OBR.2.name: Placer Order Number
OBR.2.description: Unique identifier assigned by the placer application

OBR.3.name: Filler Order Number
OBR.3.description: Unique identifier assigned by the filler application

OBR.5.name: Priority - OBR
OBR.5.description: Priority of the observation request (deprecated in v2.5)

OBR.6.name: Requested Date/Time
OBR.6.description: Date and time the observation was requested (deprecated in v2.5)

OBR.7.name: Observation Date/Time
OBR.7.description: Date and time the observation was performed

OBR.8.name: Observation End Date/Time
OBR.8.description: End date and time of the observation

OBR.10.name: Collector Identifier
OBR.10.description: Identifier of the person who collected the specimen

OBR.11.name: Specimen Action Code
OBR.11.description: Action to be taken with respect to the specimen

OBR.12.name: Danger Code
OBR.12.description: Indicates potential danger associated with the specimen

OBR.13.name: Relevant Clinical Information
OBR.13.description: Clinical information relevant to the observation

OBR.14.name: Specimen Received Date/Time
OBR.14.description: Date and time specimen was received

OBR.17.name: Order Callback Phone Number
OBR.17.description: Phone number to call for order-related questions

OBX.description: Observation/Result - Contains actual observation values and results

OBX.1.name: Set ID - OBX
OBX.1.description: Sequence number for multiple OBX segments

OBX.2.name: Value Type
OBX.2.description: Data type of the observation value

OBX.4.name: Observation Sub-ID
OBX.4.description: Sub-identifier for multiple observations of the same type

OBX.6.name: Units
OBX.6.description: Units of measure for the observation value

OBX.7.name: References Range
OBX.7.description: Normal reference range for the observation

OBX.9.name: Probability
OBX.9.description: Probability of the observation (deprecated in v2.5)

OBX.10.name: Nature of Abnormal Test
OBX.10.description: Nature of the abnormal test result (deprecated in v2.5)

OBX.12.name: Effective Date of Reference Range
OBX.12.description: Date when reference range becomes effective (deprecated in v2.5)

OBX.13.name: User Defined Access Checks
OBX.13.description: User-defined access control information (deprecated in v2.5)

OBX.14.name: Date/Time of the Observation
OBX.14.description: Date and time when the observation was made

OBX.15.name: Producer's ID
OBX.15.description: Identifier of the entity that produced the observation

NK1.description: Next of Kin/Associated Parties - Contains information about patient's next of kin or associated parties

NK1.1.name: Set ID - NK1
NK1.1.description: Sequence number for multiple NK1 segments

NK1.2.name: Name
NK1.2.description: Name of the next of kin/associated party

NK1.4.name: Address
NK1.4.description: Address of the next of kin/associated party

NK1.5.name: Phone Number
NK1.5.description: Phone number of the next of kin/associated party

NK1.10.name: Next of Kin / Associated Parties Job Title
NK1.10.description: Job title of the next of kin/associated party

NK1.11.name: Next of Kin / Associated Parties Job Code/Class

NK1.12.name: Next of Kin / Associated Parties Employee Number

EVN.description: Event Type - Contains information about the trigger event

EVN.2.name: Recorded Date/Time
EVN.2.description: Date and time the event was recorded

EVN.3.name: Date/Time Planned Event
EVN.3.description: Date and time the event was planned

EVN.5.name: Operator ID
EVN.5.description: Identifier of the person who entered the event

EVN.6.name: Event Occurred
EVN.6.description: Date and time the event actually occurred

AL1.description: Patient Allergy Information - Contains allergy information for the patient

AL1.1.name: Set ID - AL1
AL1.1.description: Sequence number for multiple AL1 segments

DG1.1.name: Set ID - DG1
DG1.1.description: Sequence number for multiple DG1 segments

DG1.2.name: Diagnosis Coding Method
DG1.2.description: Method used for diagnosis coding (deprecated in v2.5)

DG1.4.name: Diagnosis Description
DG1.4.description: Description of the diagnosis (deprecated in v2.5)

DG1.9.name: DRG Approval Indicator
DG1.9.description: Indicates if DRG is approved (deprecated in v2.5)

DG1.10.name: DRG Grouper Review Code
DG1.10.description: DRG grouper review code (deprecated in v2.5)

DG1.12.name: Outlier Days
DG1.12.description: Number of outlier days (deprecated in v2.5)

DG1.14.name: Grouper Version And Type
DG1.14.description: Version and type of grouper (deprecated in v2.5)

PR1.1.name: Set ID - PR1
PR1.1.description: Sequence number for multiple PR1 segments

PR1.2.name: Procedure Coding Method
PR1.2.description: Method used for procedure coding (deprecated in v2.5)

PR1.4.name: Procedure Description
PR1.4.description: Description of the procedure (deprecated in v2.5)

PR1.5.name: Procedure Date/Time
PR1.5.description: Date and time the procedure was performed

PR1.8.name: Anesthesiologist
PR1.8.description: Anesthesiologist for the procedure (deprecated in v2.5)

PR1.9.name: Anesthesia Code
PR1.9.description: Type of anesthesia used (deprecated in v2.5)

PR1.10.name: Anesthesia Minutes
PR1.10.description: Duration of anesthesia in minutes (deprecated in v2.5)

PR1.12.name: Procedure Practitioner
PR1.12.description: Other practitioners involved in the procedure

PR1.13.name: Consent Code
PR1.13.description: Consent status for the procedure (deprecated in v2.5)

PR1.15.name: Associated Diagnosis Code
PR1.15.description: Diagnosis associated with the procedure (deprecated in v2.5)

GT1.description: Guarantor - Contains guarantor information for billing purposes

GT1.1.name: Set ID - GT1
GT1.1.description: Sequence number for multiple GT1 segments

GT1.8.name: Guarantor Date/Time Of Birth
GT1.8.description: Guarantor's date and time of birth

IN1.1.name: Set ID - IN1
IN1.1.description: Sequence number for multiple IN1 segments

IN1.6.name: Insurance Co Contact Person
IN1.6.description: Contact person at the insurance company

IN1.7.name: Insurance Co Phone Number
IN1.7.description: Phone number of the insurance company

IN1.12.name: Plan Effective Date
IN1.12.description: Date the insurance plan becomes effective

IN1.18.name: Insured's Date Of Birth
IN1.18.description: Date of birth of the insured

MSA.description: Message Acknowledgment - Contains acknowledgment information for messages

MSA.2.name: Message Control ID
MSA.2.description: Message control ID from the original message being acknowledged

MSA.5.name: Delayed Acknowledgment Type
MSA.5.description: Type of delayed acknowledgment (deprecated in v2.5)

ERR.6.name: Application Error Parameter
ERR.6.description: Parameters related to the application error

ERR.9.name: Inform Person Indicator
ERR.9.description: Indicates who should be informed of the error

ERR.10.name: Override Type
ERR.10.description: Type of override that can be applied

ST.name: String Data
ST.description: String data type for text fields

TX.name: Text Data
TX.description: Text data type for longer text fields

CE.name: Coded Element
CE.description: Coded element with identifier, text, and coding system

CX.name: Extended Composite ID
CX.description: Extended composite ID with number and assigning authority

PL.name: Person Location
PL.description: Person location including point of care, room, bed, facility, etc.

HD.name: Hierarchic Designator
HD.description: Hierarchic designator for namespace ID, universal ID, and universal ID type

CP.name: Composite Price
CP.description: Composite price including price, price type, from date, to date

common_events: A06 - Change an outpatient to an inpatient
A07 - Change an inpatient to an outpatient
R01 - Unsolicited transmission of an observation message

version_info.description: This JSON covers HL7 v2.x standard fields. Field availability and requirements may vary between versions (2.1, 2.2, 2.3, 2.3.1, 2.4, 2.5, 2.5.1, 2.6, 2.7, 2.8, 2.9). Always consult the specific version documentation for exact requirements.
notes: Some fields marked as deprecated may not be available in newer versions
Field lengths may vary between versions
Required status may change between versions
Additional fields may be available in newer versions
Custom Z-segments and fields are allowed for local implementations
